## Resona Asset Management increases its Arista Networks position

Routine institutional flow; not actionable in isolation unless accompanied by multiple concurrent accumulation disclosures from separate managers.

- Japanese institutional manager Resona Asset Management added to its ANET holdings
- Routine 13F-style disclosure; no strategic, product, or fundamental catalyst implied
- Low classifier confidence; no position size or percentage change disclosed in headline
- Standard passive accumulation disclosure
